About Me

I am an undergraduate student at Utah Valley University. I am majoring in Bioinformatics while also obtaining certificates in Data Analytics and Geographic Information Systems (GIS). I’ve had the opportunity to be a part of several research projects while attending UVU. I have gained experience and skills from these research projects which include:

  • Collection of plant and soil samples in Capitol Reef National Park
  • Water quality analyses of collected samples from rivers, lakes, and wastewater treatment plants
  • Geospatial analyses of land cover and land use in the Utah Lake watershed
  • Writing scripts in Bash and R to analyze microbial data from Mangrove samples
